storage.value:
User Story

As a system user

I want to be able to preview Product Contract’s detail page

So that I can get all the information about product contract from one interface

Acceptance criteria:

  1. Check system user permission to open Product Contract’s detail page

    1. Viewing Product Contract

      1. Allows to see all product contract in system

    2. Viewing deleted Product Contract

      1. Allows to see all deleted product contract in system

        1. Edit/Delete buttons are disabled, read only view will be loaded

  2. Last Product Contract version will be loaded on Product Contract’s detail page by default

  3. From version’s dropdown will be possible to change version and display different version of product contract

  4. In version dropdown should display:

    1. Version number

    2. Version creation date

    3. E.g. 1 8/15.04.2021

  5. All fields and sub-objects will be disabled in product contract detail page/in pop-ups except activation/deactivation functionality, task and activity related buttons (Plus and Refresh) and Preview button

  6. Sub-objects should be opened In Modal windows when clicking on it

    1. Proxy

    2. Employee

    3. Assistant Employees

    4. Internal intermediary

    5. External intermediary

  7. Should be able to open in preview mode the product version with all its settings and sub-objects that is applicable for the opened contract by clicking on product in the contract preview mode

  8. Objects will be disabled and Clicking on them will open a new browser tab in preview mode

    1. Customer – opens customer detail page

    2. Communication Data for billing – opens customer detail page

    3. Communication Data for contract– opens customer detail page

    4. Related contracts/orders

    5. Signed from/to (open added contract page on the preview mode)

  9. Documents - Clicking on them will download the document

  10. Task

    1. It is possible to add tasks to the contract by clicking on a Plus button on the task's sub-object

    2. In order to create a task from the contract, user should have additional permission: Permission - Create Task from contract

      1. This permission grants the ability to create tasks in the Preview

      2. In the preview/edit mode, the Task button should be enabled.

      3. If the user does not have contract edit permission, it is only possible to create a task in the Preview mode.

    3. Adding task to Product Contract is optional

    4. Clicking on a Plus button will open new browser window of the task's creation page

      1. If the task creation page is open from the product contract , that contract should be displayed in Contract/Order sub-object in the task automatically

      2. If the task creation page is open from the product contract page, Contract/Order value should be selected automatically in the Connection Type and it is not possible to change it

    5. After creating a task and refresh its sub-object, it will be automatically added to the contract

    6. Task should be added with the following format: Task number-Creation date-Task type

    7. It is possible to add more than one task to the contract

    8. After adding task to the contract, It is possible to go to the task's detail page when clicking on its name or an arrow

      1. Open task's detailed page in a new tab

  11. Activity

    1. It is possible to add activities to the product contract by clicking on a Plus button on the activity's sub-object

    2. Permission - Create Activity from Contract

      1. This permission grants the ability to create an Activity in the Preview/Edit mode.

        1. In the preview mode, the Activity Create button should be enabled.

        2. If the user does not have Contract edit permission, it is only possible to create a task in the Preview mode

    3. Adding activity to the product contract is optional

    4. Adding Activity to the product contract is possible only on the editing mode

      1. On the product contract creation mode, it is not possible to add activity and its sub-object should be disabled

    5. Clicking on a Plus button will open new browser window of the activity's creation page

      1. When the activity's creation page is opened from the product contract, the contract should be displayed in the sub-object automatically

    6. After creating an activity, it will be automatically added to the product contract

    7. Activity should be added with the following format: Activity-Sub-activity

    8. It is possible to add more than one activity to the product contract

    9. After adding activity to the product contract, it is not possible to delete it

    10. After adding activity to the product contract, it is possible to go to the activity's detailed page when clicking on its name or an arrow

      1. Open activity's detailed page in a new tab

  12. Activation/Deactivation flow

    1. Activation/Deactivation button should be enable only on Product Contract’s preview mode

    2. When user activates POD on product contract’s preview mode, it is mandatory to display relevant status (Active in Terms) and date (Date of Activation) on the first tab of the contract

    3. Contract with following statuses should be checked in POD activation process (contract’s with other statuses/sub-statuses should be skipped):

      1. Status - Signed; Sub status - signed by both sides, special processes

      2. Status - Entered into force, Sub status - all

      3. Status - Active in term, Sub status - all

      4. Status - Active in perpetuity, Sub status - all

    4. Contracts with all other statuses should be skipped in POD activation process from validations:

      1. Draft

      2. Ready

      3. Signed - signed by customer, signed by EPRES

      4. Terminated

      5. Cancelled

    5. Operation is enabled when POD is saved in contract, if not disable button

    6. Clicking on icon will open Modal window for adding removing activation date

    7. Fields added in modal window:

      1. Point of delivery

        1. Display PODs identifier

        2. Disabled and can’t be changed

      2. Activation Date

        1. Less or equal than deactivation date

      3. Deactivation Date

        1. More or equal than activation date

      4. Deactivation reason

        1. Single Select dropdown

        2. List of deactivation reason is manageable from nomenclature

        3. Display Search Bar if number of items are more than 10 items in dropdown list

        4. While typing search letter list in dropdown should be filtered by search letters

        5. Display default value if returned from nomenclature

      5. When POD is deactivated from defined process, hardcoded value should be set in the field - “Activated in new version”.

        1. this value should be set in deactivation reason after automatic POD deactivation from

          • manual/mass import

          • contract’s version start date changing

          • contract new version creation

          • resigning flow

          • contract current version creation (from customer new version)

    8. Before set or replace activation date in POD should check contract signing date and it should be less or equal then pod activation date

    9. when adding POD in contract should check if this POD has activation date without deactivation date in previous version and set deactivation date as a last day before new version start date.

    10. If this POD doesn’t exist in previous version but exist in another old version shouldn’t do anything even it has only activation date.

    11. When imported/selected activation date is more then current date shouldn’t update contract status.

    12. When removing POD from product contract’s version, if POD has activation date in any future version system shouldn’t remove this POD from future version.

      1. Display error: “POD can’t be removed, v3 should include at least 1 POD”

    13. when adding POD in contract should check if this POD has activation date without deactivation date in previous version and set deactivation date as a last day before new version start date.

    14. If this POD doesn’t exist in previous version but exist in another old version shouldn’t do anything even it has only activation date.

    15. It is not possible to remove POD from the contract’s version if it has activation date defined

  13. Edit/Remove icons will be displayed for editing/removing Product contract

    1. Check permission if user has permission to edit /delete, if not disable buttons

  14. Buttons/icons state:

    1. ‘Save existing version’ button in Footer is hidden

    2. ‘Create new version’ button in Footer is hidden

    3. ‘Plus’ buttons on right panels is hidden

    4. ‘Delete’ icons next to each sub-object record will be hidden

    5. ‘Ok’ green button will be hidden on pop-ups

  15. Dark mode

    1. By default system’s color is light mode

    2. it is possible to switch system’s color to Dark mode by clicking on 'Dark Mode' icon in header; Clicking again will switch to light mode
